User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the application.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

following.description: Array of UIDs this user follows.

followers.description: Array of UIDs following this user.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A post created by a user.

content.description: The text content of the post.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the author.

createdAt.description: The time the post was created.

likesCount.description: The number of likes the post has received.

repliesCount.description: The number of replies the post has received.
